message:
style: Apply consistent code formatting across core modules

Standardize code style and formatting for improved readability and
maintainability. Changes are purely cosmetic and do not affect functionality.

Formatting improvements:
- Consistent spacing around operators and assignments
- Proper line breaks for long parameter lists and function signatures
- Consistent spacing in dataclass field definitions
- Improved readability of multi-line expressions
- Consistent use of blank lines between function definitions

Files updated:
- gpt_synaptic.py: Format GPTSynapticConfig dataclass, improve parameter
  list readability, standardize spacing
- synaptic.py: Format SynapticConfig and utility functions, improve
  spacing in mathematical expressions
- enable_synapses.py: Format build_synaptic function signature and
  GPTSynapticConfig instantiation for better readability

All changes maintain exact functional behavior while improving code
clarity and consistency with project style guidelines.
